name: Paper.io 2
core_loop: Draw trails to capture territory, expand your zone, and eliminate opponents by crossing their paths.
audience_proxy: Broad casual audience, appealing to both male and female players across a wide age range (10-35) looking for quick, competitive bursts.
visual_style: Vibrant, minimalist 3D top-down with bright, solid colors.

palette.description: Bright, high-contrast primary colors with neon accents.
